content.text: according to what's saved in mira's record, she made the transition from purees to finger foods at 9 months old — so that would have been around september 2024, given she's 18 months now. that's right in line with common practice, as most babies move toward soft finger foods somewhere between 8 and 10 months as their pincer grasp develops. if you ever want to note anything more specific about how that went (foods she took to easily, anything she avoided), i can save that to her record for reference.
